choices.text: P2PKH starts with 1 (legacy), P2SH with 3 (multisig wrapper), SegWit P2WPKH/P2WSH with bc1q, Taproot P2TR with bc1p. Modern wallets default to bc1q or bc1p for smaller tx + privacy.

Taproot (bc1p) — smallest tx, best privacy (all P2TR outputs look identical on-chain), Schnorr signatures aggregatable for cheap multisig. ~50% tx size reduction vs. P2PKH. Some exchanges still catching up on support.
